zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Legh於1306年出生在英國英格蘭爾諾波利時，他的父親John de Legh Venables I27歲，母親Elena de Baguley26歲。他於1320年與Sybil de Honeford在英國英格蘭爾阿德林頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1370年在英國英格蘭爾阿德林頓享年64歲，埋葬在英國爾阿德林頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Legh于1306年出生在英国英格兰爾諾波利时，他的父亲John de Legh Venables I27岁，母亲Elena de Baguley26岁。他于1320年与Sybil de Honeford在英国英格兰爾阿德林頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1370年在英国英格兰爾阿德林頓享年64岁，埋葬在英国爾阿德林頓。

nameMeanings.name: Legh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Leigh
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places (in at least sixteen counties, but especially Leigh in Lancashire) named either with the nominative case of Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’ (see Lee ) or with lēage, a late dative form of this word (see Lye ).
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 李, based on its Cantonese pronunciation. See   Li   1.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Legh was born in 1306, in Norbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John de Legh Venables I, was 27 and his mother, Elena de Baguley, was 26. He married Sybil de Honeford in 1320, in Adlington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1370, in Adlington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 64, and was buried in Adlington, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Legh est né en 1306, à Norbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Legh Venables I, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Elena de Baguley, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Sybil de Honeford en 1320, à Adlington, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1370, à Adlington, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Adlington, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Legh 1306 in Norbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Legh Venables I 27 und seine Mutter Elena de Baguley 26. Er hat 1320 in Adlington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Sybil de Honeford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1370 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Adlington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Adlington, Cheshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Legh è nato il nel 1306 nel Norbury, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John de Legh Venables I, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Elena de Baguley, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Sybil de Honeford nel 1320, nel Adlington, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1370, nel Adlington, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Adlington, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Leghが1306年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアノーブリーで生まれた時，父John de Legh Venables Iは27歳，母Elena de Baguleyは26歳であった。1320年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアアドリントンでSybil de Honefordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1370年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアアドリントンで64歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアアドリントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Legh(이)가 1306년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 노르버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Legh Venables I(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Elena de Baguley(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1320년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 애들링턴에서 Sybil de Honeford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1370년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 애들링턴에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 애들링턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Legh nasceu em 1306, em Norbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John de Legh Venables I, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Elena de Baguley, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Sybil de Honeford em 1320, em Adlington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1370, em Adlington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Adlington, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Legh родился в 1306 г. в местности норбури, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John de Legh Venables I было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Elena de Baguley, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Sybil de Honeford в 1320 г. в местности адлингтон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1370 г. в местности адлингтон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности адлингтон, чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Legh nació en 1306, en Norbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John de Legh Venables I, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Elena de Baguley, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Sybil de Honeford en 1320, en Adlington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1370, en Adlington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Adlington, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
